steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states that omitting the subject's elitism and ideological complexity "establishes him as a compelling and well-defined protagonist." The correct answer must name the effect of that omission.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: describes an effect the passage does not identify. ✗
  • Choice B: describes an effect the passage does not identify. ✗
  • Choice C — 'unambiguous thematic presentation': a well-defined protagonist free of internal contradiction is precisely an unambiguous presentation — matches the passage directly. ✓
  • Choice D: describes an effect the passage does not identify. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
